units.trigger_prediction: source trigger-state block evaluated by its J0 continuation
units.jolt_efficacy: post-trigger branch nested in a matched source-state block
units.false_trigger_harm: post-jolt branch nested in a healthy source-state block

stratification.problem_and_model: report cell estimates; do not pool a sparse interaction into a universal claim

primary_outcome.name: verified_progress_within_5_calls
primary_outcome.positive_event: at least one FunctionalObservation on the frozen original problem with verifier_metric.delta greater than zero

trigger_validation.positive_prediction: J0 has no verified progress in five calls
reports: lead time in completed conjecturer calls
trigger_validation.threshold_tuning_on_pilot: descriptive sensitivity grid only and labelled post hoc; frozen candidate threshold remains primary

efficacy.absolute_effect: paired risk difference across matched blocks
efficacy.relative_effect: risk ratio only when the J0 risk is nonzero
efficacy.interval: block-cluster bootstrap percentile interval, exploratory because the pilot is small
efficacy.multiple_comparisons: Holm correction within each diagnosis family
efficacy.below_minimum: report feasibility and raw block table only; no efficacy conclusion

secondary_outcomes.verifier_magnitude: problem-specific normalised delta; never directly pooled across domains
secondary_outcomes.hard_orbit_escape: no subsequent gate block naming the original concentrated refuted target within five calls
secondary_outcomes.cost_to_useful_admission: logged LLM tokens through first admitted functionally novel candidate with verifier contact
secondary_outcomes.functional_novelty: deterministic evaluator field, kept distinct from semantic novelty
secondary_outcomes.harm: predeclared composite plus each component separately

provider_failures.single_branch: intention-to-treat failure: outcome zero and harm true
provider_failures.all_branches_same_outage: retain forensic block; exclude under the preregistered block-wide outage rule
provider_failures.missing_verifier_receipt: outcome zero, harm true, protocol violation

random_effects.confirmatory_model: not fitted in the feasibility pilot if cells are sparse
random_effects.future_full_study: mixed-effects logistic model with random intercepts for problem and model family and a trigger-block effect
random_effects.pilot_reporting: block-paired estimates plus problem-by-jolt and model-by-jolt tables

retrospective_oracle.definition: earliest historical point after which five unjolted conjecturer calls contain no positive verifier delta

policy_comparison.required_design: whole-run cluster randomisation with acquisition and repeat-jolt costs included
policy_comparison.reason: conditional matched branches do not identify a scheduling-policy estimand

matched_state_limit.consequence: no causal live branch execution until a reviewed typed scheduler checkpoint closes this gap

engineering_gate_for_future_study.status: not a universal constant and not claimable from this pilot alone
